description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style car with a rounded, streamlined body painted in a glossy blue finish. The vehicle features two doors, a small front grille, and classic circular headlights, evoking the design of mid-20th-century European city cars. The windows are tinted black, and the roof appears to have a black sunroof or fabric top. Chrome accents are visible on the bumpers, door handles, and hubcaps, adding to its retro aesthetic. The wheels are small and covered with simple, silver hubcaps. The rear of the car includes a vented engine cover and a rectangular license plate area.
description: A small, vintage blue car with a rounded body, chrome accents, and classic circular headlights.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the vented engine cover, chrome bumper, and rectangular license plate area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door design, black roof, and chrome hubcaps.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the circular headlights, small grille, and chrome bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door, black roof, and wheel details.
attribute_headlight_design: Two round headlights, single arrangement, classic chrome bezel
